200 O true believers, be patient and strive to excel in patience, and be
constant-minded, and fear GOD, that ye may be happy.

CHAPTER IV.

ENTITLED, WOMEN;q REVEALED AT MEDINA.

IN THE NAME OF THE MOST MERCIFUL GOD
